text:
Thanks for the details — a $1,200 ACH withdrawal requested April 6, still showing pending after 6 business days.

I can't confirm the specific reason for the delay from here. I'm passing this to our payments ops team to look into it. To help them locate it faster, it's useful if you can provide the last 4 digits of the bank account it's going to and the approximate time you submitted the request.

We'll follow up once we have more information.

Novig Support
